Apollox Finance

Empowering traders and stakers with unparalleled opportunities.

  • Freedom of Choice

    Dual product offering of V1 orderbook and V2 on-chain trading. Trade the widest selection in the market with ultra-high leverage.

  • Trustless environment

    No third-party intermediary. No need for sign-up. Simply connect your DeFi wallet and start trading. Audit reports from Certik, Salus Security, and PeckShield.

  • Multichain ecosystem

    V1 supports BNB chain, Ethereum, Arbitrum one, ZkSync Era and Base. V2 supports BNB chain and Arbitrum One. More supported chains on the way.

  • Embrace V2

    Fully on-chain trading.

    No need for deposits. Self custody.

  • Onchain-V2

    0 Slippage Trading Experience

    0 slippage on V2 Degen Mode. As low as 0.01% slippage for V2 classic perps.

  • Onchain-V2

    Yield-Earning Opportunities

    Amplify returns with the highest stablecoin LP yield among perpetual trading platforms.

And APX V1
  • Supports Multiple Networks

    V1 supports BNB Chain, Ethereum, Arbitrum One, zkSync Era, Base and Manta.

  • CEX-like Trading Experience

    Intuitive interface, deep orderbook liquidity and API trading support.

  • Powerful Match Engine

    High transaction performance and security. Used by 30+ partners including PancakeSwap.

Funding

Backed by credible VCs and institutions to shape decentralized derivatives trading.

Delve into the advancements in yield farming brought by ApolloX Finance, optimizing liquidity and maximizing financial opportunities.

Uncover ApolloX Finance’s dedication to delivering scalable and secure financial solutions, ensuring stability in ever-evolving markets.

Explore the foundational principles and mission of ApolloX Finance, revolutionizing digital finance with innovation and security.

Learn about ApolloX Finance’s decentralized asset swap mechanisms, enabling smooth and trustless transactions across various digital assets.
